title: NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE - 211info
text: NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential crisis intervention, information and referral, message delivery, and conference services. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-21 who are homeless or runaway youth and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 786-2929 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (773) 880-9860 Administration (800) 786-2929 Hotline 1-800-RUNAWAY 66008 Text Short Code Hotline (800) 786-2929 Safeline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, online chat, or text for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTALLY OVERCOMING CHALLENGES AND ADVERSITY SAFELINE TRANSPORTATION - HOME FREE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
